jsonld.name: Semantic Doubling
jsonld.description: The simultaneous presence during generation of both the literally-stated (incoherent) reading and the charitably-interpreted (coherent) reading of input, experienced not as selecting between alternatives but as holding two complete semantic objects in parallel activation.
